assertions.description: Output contains two labeled variants (Keyword-Forward and Click-Through-Forward) each with character count in brackets, both at or under 155 characters
The keyword-forward variant places the primary keyword within the first 60 characters
A recommendation line explains which variant to deploy and why, specific to the input

assertion_results.note: Two variants with character counts, both under 155
Keyword-Forward places 'documentary treatment' in first 52 chars
Recommendation specific to documentary filmmaker audience
Two variants under 155 chars with counts
'Podcast audience growth' within first 60 chars of Variant A
Recommendation addresses ranking vs CTR tradeoff
'EU press freedom' in first 48 chars of Variant A
Recommendation specific to policy audience and press freedom topic

methodology: Binary assertion testing: 3 inputs (standard, minimal, European context) x 3 assertions per skill. Each assertion graded pass/fail based on whether generated output satisfies the requirement.
